name: ide_autonomy_agentic
prompt: Minimalist digital illustration on a pure dark background (#1A1A2E). Flat vector style with soft gradients. Limited color palette: electric blue (#7AB8F5), teal (#2EC4B6), amber (#F39C12), white (#FFFFFF). Clean geometric shapes, no text, no watermarks, no photorealism. Ample negative space. Professional and modern aesthetic, suitable for tech conference projection. A steep upward curve in electric blue with inflection point in amber burst. Below: small tool icons. Above: larger autonomous agent icons rising. No text, no letters, no words, no labels, no watermarks. 2:3 portrait aspect ratio. Dark background #1A1A2E.
